identity_baseline: High-status magical ruler and powerful witch.
origin_or_historical_context: Ruler of the Quadlings; associated with a ruby throne.
stable_visual_summary: Glinda is a powerful humanoid entity and the Witch of the South, possessing a high-status magical presence. Her visual identity is tied to her role as a ruler, specifically associated with a ruby throne.
costume_signature: high-status magical attire associated with a ruby throne.
role: The most powerful of all the Witches; ruler over the Quadlings.
relationship_notes: Associated with Dorothy, Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, and Lion.
Subject to inquiries by travelers seeking her presence.
continuity_constraints: Visual presentation must maintain a high-status magical presence.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific physical appearance (facial features, hair, etc.) is unknown.
Specific clothing details beyond "high-status" are unknown.
